bracu_official.title: UG "Wishlist" Event Schedule, Fall 2026
bracu_official.summary: An event schedule for undergraduate "Wishlist" programs for Fall 2026 has been announced.

bracu_official.title: BRAC University seminar raises awareness on cervical cancer
bracu_official.summary: BRAC University organized a seminar to raise awareness about cervical cancer among the community.

bracu_official.title: ‘Eco-Friendly Cafeteria’ initiative encourages sustainable choices at BRAC University
bracu_official.summary: BRAC University launched an ‘Eco-Friendly Cafeteria’ initiative to promote sustainable choices on campus.

bracu_official.title: BRAC University law graduate awarded prestigious joint doctoral scholarship between the University of Glasgow and the University of Sydney
bracu_official.summary: A law graduate from BRAC University received a prestigious joint doctoral scholarship from the University of Glasgow and the University of Sydney.
